title: RUHS BSc Nursing Application Form 2026

detail.title: RUHS BSc Nursing Application Form 2026
detail.short_info: Rajasthan University of Health Sciences (RUHS) has released the BSc Nursing application form 2026. Candidates with 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology and English can apply online from 01-04-2026 to 21-04-2026 through the RUHS website, ruhsraj.org.

content.text: RUHS BSc Nursing Application Form 2026 is now available on the official portal of Rajasthan University of Health Sciences (RUHS), Jaipur. The application window opened on 1 April 2026 and will remain open until 21 April 2026. This is the crucial step for candidates seeking admission to the Bachelor of Science (B.Sc) Nursing programme in various government and private colleges affiliated with RUHS.

Conducted through RUHS CUET 2026, the entrance exam is scheduled for 21 May 2026. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology, and English can apply online. With a limited application period, it is important to fill out the form carefully, upload the correct documents, and pay the fee on time to avoid rejection. This page provides the direct RUHS BSc Nursing 2026 application link, complete eligibility details, a step-by-step guide, important dates, and all necessary information to help you apply successfully without any mistakes.

The RUHS BSc Nursing Application Form 2026 is currently active. Applications are accepted only through online mode on the official RUHS website. Candidates are advised to apply before the last date to avoid last-minute technical issues.

rows: Rajasthan University of Health Sciences (RUHS), Jaipur
10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology & English; 45% marks (40% for SC/ST/OBC)
Open to all India candidates; preference for Rajasthan domicile

sections.heading: How to Apply for RUHS BSc Nursing 2026

items: Visit the official website ruhsraj.org or the dedicated RUHS CUET application portal.
Click on “RUHS CUET 2026 Apply Online” or “B.Sc Nursing Application Form” link.
Register with your basic details such as name, date of birth, mobile number, and email ID.
Login using the generated credentials and fill the application form carefully.
Upload scanned copies of your recent photograph and signature in the prescribed format.
Pay the required application fee online through debit/credit card or net banking.
Review all the entered details, submit the form, and download/print the confirmation page.

sections.heading: Documents Required for RUHS BSc Nursing 2026

items: Recent passport-size photograph (maximum 100 KB)
Candidate’s signature (maximum 50 KB)
Class 10 and Class 12 mark sheets and certificates
Caste certificate (if applicable)
Domicile certificate (if required)
Valid ID proof

rows: As per official notification (check for negative marking)

content.text: The syllabus is based on Class 12 NCERT curriculum. It includes:

items: Physics, Chemistry & Biology: Complete syllabus of Class 12
English: Grammar, Vocabulary, Comprehension and Basic Communication Skills

content.text: Major topics cover Human Physiology, Cell Structure, Laws of Motion, Organic Chemistry, Genetics, etc.
